# __pycache__

This folder is auto-generated by Python when the interpreter compiles `.py` source files.

## Contents

- `*.cpython-XXX.pyc` — compiled bytecode files Python uses to speed up subsequent runs

## Notes

- These files are safe to delete. Python will regenerate them the next time the script runs.
- This folder should be listed in `.gitignore` and is not part of the project source.
